description: Resource type definition for AWS::SageMaker::Action. An action is a lineage tracking entity that represents an action or activity, such as a model deployment or an HPO job.

SourceUri.markdownDescription:
The URI of the source.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Update requires: No interruption

SourceType.markdownDescription:
The type of the source.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

The ID of the source.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No

Maximum Length: 1024  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No

Key.markdownDescription:

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128

Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: Yes

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ActionName.description: The name of the action. Must be unique to your account in an AWS Region.
ActionName.markdownDescription:
The name of the action. Must be unique to your account in an AWS Region.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 120  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,119}$  
Update requires: Replacement

The action type.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: Replacement

---

Required: No
